_comment: Sample analytics store after ~25 sessions over 3 weeks. Total object size: ~450 bytes.

analytics._hr_comment: Peak at 9pm (index 21 = 6 sessions). User practices mostly in the evening.
analytics._dw_comment: 0=Sun..6=Sat. Fairly even spread, slight peak on Wednesday (index 2 = 5).
analytics._mood_comment: avgPre=5.6, avgPost=7.8, avgImprovement=+2.2. Sessions consistently improve mood.
analytics._comp_comment: 84% completion rate. 2 emergency ends, 2 incomplete (closed tab or back-to-edit).
analytics._dur_comment: Total: 312 minutes. Average: 749 seconds (~12.5 min per session).
analytics._cfg_comment: avgRate=0.61 (slightly slower than default 0.65). avgDrone=0.35 (default). avgVol=0.98 (near max).
analytics._feat_comment: Binary: 00110111. Bits set: AFFIRMATIONS(1) + PROGRAMS(2) + CUSTOM_PERSONA(4) + TIMING_FIX(16) + SHARE(32) = 55. User has NOT tried: skip-to-script, backup, double-induction.

derived_insights._comment: These values are computed by deriveInsights() at display time, NOT stored.

session_record_sample._comment: One entry from the stillness_history_v1 array.
session_record_sample.journal: Felt a deep sense of calm after the settling phase. The rain soundscape was perfect.
session_record_sample.script:
===SETTLING===
Focus on the sound of the road beneath you... [PAUSE 4] ...(truncated for sample)...
session_record_sample.intentionText: I want to feel calm and centered after a stressful day

profile_sample.name: Alex
profile_sample.about: Software developer, chronic stress. Looking for non-pharmaceutical tools.
profile_sample.appearance: Tall, dark hair, brown eyes. Tension in shoulders and jaw.
profile_sample.goals: Manage work anxiety, improve sleep quality, explore deeper trance states.

settings_sample.intentionInput: I want to feel calm and centered after a stressful day
settings_sample.userAffirmations:
I am safe and at peace.
My body knows how to relax.
I release what I cannot control.
